critical.description: The `_load_queue()` and `_save_queue()` fallback on `open()` bypasses file locking and introduces race conditions with `label_queue.json`. `SharedFileManager` should be strictly enforced.

moderate.issue: Missing Defensive Error Handling on SAP Calls
moderate.description: Integration points like `queue_order()` need robust `try/except` wraps to prevent network timeouts from crashing the loop.
The `interactive_mode()` function couples view/CLI logic tightly within the backend core. It should be refactored into a separate file.
Status checks rely on hardcoded strings instead of the existing `ItemStatus` Enum.

minor.description: Scatter logic for module loading and timestamp generation. Refactor all logic globally to centralize configuration and dependency graphs.
